settings.heading: What are Cherokee Infinity Pursuit men's scrubs?
settings.content: Cherokee Infinity Pursuit men's scrubs are healthcare workwear built for caregivers who want flexibility, durability, and confidence without compromise — scrubs that go where you do, from shift to street. Pursuit takes men's scrubs and reimagines them with refined tailoring, athletic polish, and performance-driven comfort.

settings.heading: What fabric and technology is used in Cherokee Infinity Pursuit men's scrubs?
settings.content: Pursuit men's scrubs are made with a premium, breathable knit that delivers 360° stretch for freedom of movement in every direction. The fabric features moisture control to keep you cool and dry and wrinkle recovery so you stay looking sharp through a long shift. PROTX2® antimicrobial technology is built in to fight odors, prevent sweat stains, and inhibit the growth of microorganisms that cause odor and fabric damage — so your scrubs hold up and feel fresh from start to finish.

settings.heading: What makes Cherokee Infinity Pursuit different from standard Infinity scrubs?
settings.content: Pursuit takes the performance foundation of Infinity and adds a streetwear-inspired aesthetic that works on and off the clock. Where Infinity focuses on the clinical setting, Pursuit draws cues from vintage athletic uniforms and elevated streetwear — varsity jackets, crisp lines, tonal trims, and rich colorways that look fresh after hours. The fabric adds wrinkle recovery on top of Infinity's moisture-wicking stretch, and the styling is polished but never stiff. Built-in function meets lifestyle flair.

settings.heading: Can Infinity Pursuit men's scrubs be worn off duty?
settings.content: Pursuit is designed specifically for shift-to-street wear — scrubs that perform under pressure and still look fresh after hours. The styling draws from vintage athletic uniforms and elevated streetwear: varsity jackets, crisp lines, tonal trims, and colorways like Retro Green, Butterscotch, and Pewter that work outside a clinical setting. Polished but never stiff, Pursuit was built for caregivers who don't want to change their look when they leave the floor.

settings.heading: Who are Cherokee Infinity Pursuit men's scrubs designed for?
settings.content: Built for male nurses, LPNs, RNs, medical assistants, surgical techs, and other healthcare professionals who want performance scrubs with a modern, streetwear-inspired edge. Pursuit is the right fit for caregivers who want flexibility and durability through long clinical shifts and a style they can carry past the hospital doors. If you want scrubs that look as good off the clock as they perform on it, Pursuit was designed for that.
